field.name: line_ids
field.eval:
[ (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_representation'), 'value_fixed': 50000}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_housing'), 'value_fixed': 50000}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_mobile'), 'value_in_kind': 'Mobile Apparatus with unlimited airtime'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_fuel'), 'value_in_kind': 'Automobile with Coupons for unlimited liters of fuel.'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_gym'), 'value_percentage': 100}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_severance'), 'value_in_kind': '2 or more years of experience, three months net Salary'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_perdiem_local'), 'value_in_kind': '1. Perdiem: ETB 1500/day
2. Accomodation: per Receipt'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_perdiem_foreign'), 'value_in_kind': '1. Perdiem: USD 300/day
2. Accomodation: per Receipt
3. Taxi in: USD 30/day
4. Incenental: In USD 30/day'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_medical_domestic'), 'value_in_kind': 'unlimited'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_medical_abroad'), 'value_in_kind': 10000 USD}) ]

field.name: line_ids
field.eval:
[ (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_representation_perc'), 'value_percentage': 10}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_housing'), 'value_fixed': 20000}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_mobile'), 'value_in_kind': 'Mobile Apparatus with unlimited airtime'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_fuel'), 'value_in_kind': 'Automobile with Coupons for unlimited liters of fuel.'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_gym'), 'value_percentage': 100}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_severance'), 'value_in_kind': '2 or more years of experience, three months net Salary'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_perdiem_local'), 'value_in_kind': '1. Perdiem 1500
2. Accomodation: per Receipt'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_perdiem_foreign'), 'value_in_kind': '1. Perdiem: USD 250 /day
2. Accomodation: Per receipt upto USD 300
3. Taxi in: USD 25 /day
4. Incenental: In USD 25 /day'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_medical_domestic'), 'value_in_kind': '90/10'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_medical_abroad'), 'value_fixed': 10000}) ]

field.name: job_ids
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ ref('job_internal_audit_director'), ref('job_risk_compliance_director'), ref('job_legal_services_director'), ref('job_project_office_director'), ref('job_director_district_north'), ref('job_director_district_south'), ref('job_director_marketing_comm'), ref('job_director_enterprise_strategy'), ref('job_director_finance_treasury'), ref('job_director_procurement_facilities'), ref('job_director_human_capital'), ref('job_director_msme_rural'), ref('job_director_institutional_rel'), ref('job_director_credit_appraisal'), ref('job_director_corporate_rel'), ref('job_director_international_banking'), ref('job_director_it_app'), ref('job_director_it_infra') ])]

field.name: line_ids
field.eval:
[ (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_representation_perc'), 'value_percentage': 10}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_housing'), 'value_fixed': 10000}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_mobile'), 'value_in_kind': 'ETB 800'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_fuel'), 'value_in_kind': 'Automobile with Birr equivalent of 300 liters of fuel'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_severance'), 'value_in_kind': '3 or more years of experience, three months net Salary'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_perdiem_local'), 'value_in_kind': '1. 2. Accomodation: per Receipt upto ETB 1200'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_perdiem_foreign'), 'value_in_kind': '1. Perdiem: USD 200 /day
2. Accomodation: per Receipt

field.name: job_ids
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ ref('job_mgr_digital_biz'), ref('job_mgr_agency_merchant'), ref('job_mgr_digital_innovation'), ref('job_mgr_financial_strategy'), ref('job_mgr_engineering'), ref('job_mgr_tech_arch'), ref('job_mgr_it_support'), ref('job_mgr_it_security'), ref('job_mgr_mis_team'), ref('job_mgr_treasury_fund'), ref('job_mgr_gen_accounts'), ref('job_mgr_talent_acq'), ref('job_mgr_talent_dev'), ref('job_mgr_talent_prog'), ref('job_mgr_facilities_prop'), ref('job_mgr_procurement_contract'), ref('job_head_gen_service'), ref('job_mgr_cbs_aux'), ref('job_mgr_digital_apps'), ref('job_mgr_network_admin'), ref('job_mgr_sys_db_admin'), ref('job_mgr_digital_channel'), ref('job_mgr_cust_exp'), ref('job_mgr_corp_comm'), ref('job_mgr_marketing_branding'), ref('job_mgr_enterprise_strategy'), ref('job_mgr_research_market'), ref('job_mgr_partnership_msme'), ref('job_mgr_institutional_rel'), ref('job_mgr_corporate_rel'), ref('job_mgr_credit_analysis'), ref('job_mgr_credit_portfolio'), ref('job_mgr_trade_services'), ref('job_mgr_intl_remittance') ])]

field.name: line_ids
field.eval:
[ (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_salary_advance'), 'value_in_kind': 'Six months' salary amount, interest free with personal guarantee payable in 36 equal monthly installments'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_mortgage_loan'), 'value_in_kind': 'The bank allows a loan to acquire or construct a residential house with a prevailing minimum saving interest rate plus 1%'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_vehicle_loan'), 'value_in_kind': 'The bank allows a loan to acquire a vehicle with a prevailing minimum saving interest rate plus 1%'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_personal_loan'), 'value_in_kind': '1 Year salary amount, payable in 36 equal monthly installments with a prevailing minimum saving interest rate plus 1%'}), (0, 0, {'benefit_type_id': ref('benefit_type_hardship'), 'value_in_kind': 'Provide 10% to 40% but exact rate for each location depends upon circumstance.
* Make the rate determination part of branch feasibility study
* Harsh locations. 20% Assosa Branch
* Jigjiga and Assosa Branches 15%'}) ]
